selection.label: QM5_11112_sr-lines-fade
selection.reason: Highest-value collision-free structural recovery after ten-FX candidates were excluded for missing allocation, an existing repair, an open Q02 cohort, or a competing farm task.

farm_claim.collision_guard: No pending/active work item, downstream phase, economic verdict, or nonterminal agent task for QM5_11112.

ea.source: EarnForex, Support-and-Resistance-Lines public GitHub repository and MQL5 source

diagnosis.failure_evidence: All 48 retained Q02 rows ended INFRA_FAIL with summary_missing_retries_exhausted and no economic verdict.
diagnosis.root_cause: The deployed EX5 predates the 2026-07-06 QM_EntryRequest default-constructor fix, while this EA's source did not explicitly initialize symbol_slot or expiration_seconds. A signal could therefore send stack garbage into magic resolution. The EA also placed spread/news entry gates above position management and hard exits.
diagnosis.scope: Package-local stale-binary and request-initialization repair; no shared framework or registry edit.

changes: Zero-initialize every QM_EntryRequest before signal evaluation.
Set req.symbol_slot to qm_magic_slot_offset and req.expiration_seconds to zero inside Strategy_EntrySignal.
Run position management and hard exits before entry-only spread/news gates.
Advance structural level state on every closed bar even when a later entry gate blocks trading.
Reject support/resistance targets that normalize to the wrong side of the market entry.
Refresh all four setfile build hashes while retaining slots 0-3, RISK_FIXED=1000, and RISK_PERCENT=0.

clean_snapshot_compile.note: Final EX5 compiled from a detached HEAD framework snapshot plus the repaired EA source, using relative QM includes so unrelated working-tree include edits were excluded.

smoke.interpretation: Runtime/build smoke only. The weak one-year economics are not promoted as evidence of edge quality; Q02 owns that decision.

q02_handoff.duplicate_guard: Exactly one pending/active QM5_11112 row after insertion.
q02_handoff.bounded_cost_reason: Only the smoke-validated EURUSD carrier was queued; the other three approved carriers remain unqueued until Q02 supplies an economic verdict.
